catalog_content:
Item Name: Cortas - Tahina, 16 oz (454g), All Natural Sesame Paste in a Squeeze Bottle
Bullet Point 1: Authentic Lebanese Tahini: Experience the rich, nutty flavor of this all-natural sesame paste from the renowned Lebanese kitchen brand, Cortas.
Bullet Point 2: Simple and Pure: Made with only one ingredient - sesame seeds. Free from additives, preservatives, and whitening agents
Bullet Point 3: Dietary Friendly: Suitable for Vegan, Vegetarian, Gluten-free and Cholesterol-free diets, this tahini paste offers a nutritious and delicious option for various dietary preferences.
Bullet Point 4: Convenient Packaging: The 16 oz (1 lb, 454g) Aqueezable Bottle
Bullet Point 5: Product of Lebanon
Product Description: Tahini, a staple in Middle Eastern cuisine, is a versatile paste made from ground sesame seeds. Cortas' Tahini offers a rich, nutty flavor that enhances both sweet and savory dishes. This all-natural sesame paste is vegan, gluten-free, and contains no preservatives or artificial ingredients. With a smooth, creamy texture, it's perfect for making hummus, baba ghanoush, halva, and other traditional recipes. Tahini also adds depth to salad dressings, marinades, and baked goods. At 16 oz, this jar provides ample quantity for your culinary adventures. Elevate your cooking with the authentic taste of Cortas' Tahini, a Lebanese kitchen essential since 1930.
Value: 16.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Cortas Tahina is an authentic, all-natural sesame paste positioned as a mid-range specialty food product. The squeeze bottle packaging and dietary-friendly attributes (vegan, gluten-free, no preservatives) suggest a health-conscious market. The 16 oz size offers good quantity for the price, and the brand's Lebanese heritage adds authenticity. Pricing is likely driven by ingredient quality, packaging convenience, and niche appeal.

Place 1 teaspoon of tea for each desired cup into the teapot. Pour the boiling water into the pot, cover and let steep for 2-4 minutes. Strain and pour into your cup; add milk and natural sweeteners to taste. - Iced tea brewing method: (to make 1 liter/quart): Place 5 teaspoons of tea into a teapot or heat resistant pitcher. Pour 1 1/4 cups of freshly boiled water over the tea itself. Steep for 5 minutes. Fill a serving pitcher with 1/4 cold water. Strain and pour the tea into the serving pitcher Add ice and top-up with cold water. Sweeten and garnish to taste. - TerraVita is an exclusive line of premium-quality, natural source products that use only the finest, purest and most potent ingredients found around the world. Our highest possible standards are certified by independent laboratories and backed by our personal guarantee. - TerraVita exists to meet and ensure your family's health and wellness without the harmful effects of chemicals and health products.
